testsuite.name: E2E — Validate token JWT contra backend real
testsuite.system-out: 19:14:38.870 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Iniciando Playwright [ApiValidateTokenE2ETest] — baseUrl=http://localhost:80, recordings=C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings 19:14:40.169 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Tracing iniciado [ApiValidateTokenE2ETest] 19:14:40.298 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Validate sin body: status=401 19:14:40.334 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Validate sin token: status=401 19:14:40.368 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Validate con token invalido: status=401 19:14:40.394 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Validate con token expirado: status=401 19:14:40.417 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Validate con Authorization malformado: status=401 19:14:40.446 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Trace guardado: C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings\ApiValidateTokenE2ETest-trace.zip 19:14:40.570 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Cerrando Playwright [ApiValidateTokenE2ETest]
